tasks.subject: Task 1: Color model — five transfer modes + nits
tasks.description:
**Goal:** swapchain_color.hpp exposes a 5-value TransferFunction (adds ScRgb), re-adds is_hdr_float_format, maps PASS_THROUGH+float and EXTENDED_SRGB_LINEAR to ScRgb, and the transfer math takes a nits arg.

**Files:** Modify src/layer/swapchain_color.hpp; Test tests/layer/test_swapchain_color.cpp

**Verify:** meson test -C build swapchain_color

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/layer/swapchain_color.hpp", "tests/layer/test_swapchain_color.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "meson test -C build swapchain_color", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TransferFunction is {None,Srgb,ScRgb,Pq,Hlg}", "PASS_THROUGH+float -> ScRgb", "EXTENDED_SRGB_LINEAR -> ScRgb", "HDR10_ST2084 -> Pq", "_SRGB format -> Srgb", "UNORM+SRGB_NONLINEAR -> None", "apply_transfer(ScRgb,200) scales by 2.5"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: HDR fragment shader (GLSL + generated SPIR-V header)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fragment shader applying the per-mode transfer to the final fragment color, compiled to an embedded SPIR-V header.

**Files:** Create src/layer/shaders/overlay_hdr.frag; Create src/layer/shaders/overlay_hdr.frag.spv.h

**Verify:** glslangValidator -V src/layer/shaders/overlay_hdr.frag -o /tmp/t.spv

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/layer/shaders/overlay_hdr.frag", "src/layer/shaders/overlay_hdr.frag.spv.h"], "verifyCommand": "glslangValidator -V src/layer/shaders/overlay_hdr.frag -o /tmp/t.spv", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GLSL compiles with no errors", "header defines choir_overlay_hdr_frag_spv[]"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Unity-TU HDR pipeline helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** choir::create_hdr_pipeline (in our unity TU, no vendored edits) reuses ImGui's vertex shader + pipeline layout to build a custom HDR pipeline.

**Files:** Create src/layer/imgui_vk_backend.hpp; Modify src/layer/imgui_impl_vulkan_unity.cpp

**Verify:** meson compile -C build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/layer/imgui_vk_backend.hpp", "src/layer/imgui_impl_vulkan_unity.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "meson compile -C build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["create_hdr_pipeline returns non-null for valid render pass after init", "no edits under subprojects/"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Renderer — create/use/destroy the HDR pipeline
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ImguiRenderer::init takes (TransferFunction, nits), builds the HDR pipeline when transfer != None, draws with it via RenderDrawData(...,hdr_pipeline_), removes the CPU vertex transform, destroys the pipeline on shutdown.

**Files:** Modify src/layer/imgui_renderer.hpp, src/layer/imgui_renderer.cpp

**Verify:** meson compile -C build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/layer/imgui_renderer.hpp", "src/layer/imgui_renderer.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "meson compile -C build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["init takes (transfer, nits)", "hdr_pipeline_ created when transfer != None", "end_frame uses hdr_pipeline_ when set else 2-arg", "apply_transfer_u8 loop removed", "shutdown destroys hdr_pipeline_"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Avatars always UNORM
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Avatar textures always R8G8B8A8_UNORM; drop the srgb param and _SRGB branching so the shader handles transfer uniformly.

**Files:** Modify src/layer/avatar_textures.hpp, src/layer/avatar_textures.cpp

**Verify:** meson compile -C build (with Task 6)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/layer/avatar_textures.hpp", "src/layer/avatar_textures.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "meson compile -C build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["init(ImguiRenderer*) no bool srgb", "create_texture always R8G8B8A8_UNORM", "srgb_ member removed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Swapchain wiring + nits env + full suite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** swapchain.cpp computes the transfer, reads CHOIR_HDR_NITS (default 200, clamp [80,1000]), passes (transfer, nits) to imgui->init and calls avatars->init(renderer); debug log shows transfer + nits; full suite green.

**Files:** Modify src/layer/swapchain.cpp

**Verify:** meson test -C build → Fail: 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/layer/swapchain.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "meson test -C build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["imgui->init gets transfer + nits", "avatars->init(s.imgui.get()) no bool", "CHOIR_HDR_NITS clamped [80,1000] default 200", "CHOIR_DEBUG_FORMAT logs transfer + nits", "full suite Fail: 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Reinstall + manual HDR verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Install the rebuilt layer and confirm in real HDR games the overlay has correct color AND readable brightness.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Close only after every acceptanceCriteria item is re-validated independently with output captured.

**Files:** none (install + manual test)

**Verify:** user launches Overwatch (scRGB) + Cyberpunk (PQ) in HDR, inspects overlay + ~/choir.log.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "bash packaging/install-user.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["install-user.sh reports installed", "Overwatch HDR: transfer=scrgb, overlay not washed out, bright/readable", "Cyberpunk HDR: transfer=pq, correct saturation, readable", "CHOIR_HDR_NITS visibly changes brightness"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requiresUserSpecification": false, "gateScope": "manual-visual"}
```
